subject: Use non-root user to access DES database and update the base image to align with ONAP

update the base image to align with ONAP

Patch Set 5:

Jess - Could you pls check on following error reported in the verify job?  I thought LF had paid docker account.

12:05:32 [ERROR] toomanyrequests: You have reached your pull rate limit. You may increase the limit by authenticating and upgrading: https://www.docker.com/increase-rate-limit

Patch Set 5:

We did.. seems that you might be using un-authenticated pulls

You need to login with the onapdockerhub user to requests these pulls. 

That user is active with it's password in the settings file stored in Jenkins.

Patch Set 5:

> Patch Set 5:
> 
> We did.. seems that you might be using un-authenticated pulls
> 
> You need to login with the onapdockerhub user to requests these pulls. 
> 
> That user is active with it's password in the settings file stored in Jenkins.

There is no docker user specified in  pom/properties to override however the push/tag goals use explicitly  <useMavenSettingsForAuth>true</useMavenSettingsForAuth> but docker "build" does not include this setting explictly and using server defaults.

Noticed #487 run was successful. If we face issue again, will update pom.xml build goal and check
